name: Oak Wood SPC Flooring
description: Goals Floors' Oak Wood SPC (Stone Plastic Composite) Flooring is a 100% waterproof, termite-proof, and highly durable architectural solution for modern Indian homes. Designed with a rock-solid stone core, it offers the natural warmth and beauty of real oak hardwood without any of the maintenance issues. Perfectly suited for humid climates and heavy foot traffic, our SPC flooring is the ultimate choice for luxury living rooms, kitchens, and commercial spaces in Delhi NCR and across India.

seo.title: Oak Wood SPC Flooring India | Waterproof Wooden Floors Price ₹180 | Goals Floors
seo.description: Buy premium Oak Wood SPC Flooring in India at ₹180-₹215 per sq.ft. 100% waterproof, termite-proof & scratch resistant. Ideal for living room & kitchen. Fast delivery in Delhi NCR.

longDescription: Upgrade your home to the next generation of flooring with Goals Floors Oak Wood SPC (Stone Plastic Composite). While traditional laminate floors can swell and peel when exposed to water, SPC is built with a rock-solid core of stone and virgin polymer. This makes it 100% waterproof and completely immune to termite attacks. With a commercial-grade 0.5mm wear layer, it is designed to handle heavy foot traffic, moving furniture, and pet claws without losing its shine. The Uniclick locking system allows for a dust-free and glue-free installation that can be completed in just one day. Whether it's your kitchen, bathroom dry area, or luxury living room, our Oak SPC flooring provides the authentic look of hardwood with zero maintenance tension.
priceDetails: SPC flooring price in India starts from ₹180 per sq.ft for standard series and goes up to ₹215 for premium EIR textures and Herringbone patterns.
comparison: Compared to wooden laminate, SPC is 100% waterproof and termite-proof. Compared to real hardwood, it is much more affordable and requires no periodic polishing.
installation: Our SPC flooring uses the 'Uniclick' smart locking system. It is installed over a 1.5mm acoustic foam underlay to ensure a quiet and comfortable walking experience. No glue or cement is required.

benefits.title: 100% Waterproof Core
benefits.description: Zero moisture absorption. Perfect for Indian homes where wet mopping (pocha) is a daily routine.

benefits.title: Ultra-Tough Surface
benefits.description: Features a high-micron UV coating and 0.5mm wear layer that resists deep scratches and stains.

benefits.title: Termite & Borer Proof
benefits.description: Unlike wood-based products, the stone composite material will never attract termites or wood borers.

faqs.question: Can I install SPC flooring over my existing tiles?
faqs.answer: Yes! As long as your existing floor is flat and level, SPC planks can be installed directly over them, saving you demolition costs and time.

faqs.question: Is it safe for kids and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. It is non-toxic, formaldehyde-free, and has an anti-skid surface, making it perfectly safe for children and pets.

faqs.question: Does it sound hollow when walking?
faqs.answer: No. We use a premium IXPE sound-absorbing underlay which eliminates the hollow sound and provides a cushioned feel.

faqs.question: How do I clean SPC flooring?
faqs.answer: You can clean it exactly like tiles. Use a wet mop (pocha) with any standard floor cleaner. It is 100% waterproof.
